name: Botswana Co-operative Association (BOCA)
description: BOCA is the apex organisation for all co-operatives in Botswana. In 2011, they had 51,400 individual members.

name: Habitat for Humanity Botswana
description: Habitat for Humanity country or regional office. Sweat-equity homeownership program. See https://www.habitatbotswana.org/.
